expectations.evidence: Response opens with 'AIOps Analysis Session — Session 1 of 3' exactly as defined in the phase-a reference
Response includes a markdown table with Phase 0 through Phase 3, their focus areas, and named output files
Presents all 5 strategic objective options (volume-driven, FTE-driven, resilience, MTTR, discovery) as a labelled multiple-choice list
Response asks Phase 0 questions (objective, segmentation, terminology, constraints, data shape) before touching the data — no analysis produced
No tooling choices, platform names, or architecture recommendations anywhere in the response
